# ANALYSIS: SNIPER_REAL_FILLS_GRINDER_TOP_KEEPER

**Filed:** 2026-06-18  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** analysis  
**Status:** INTERNAL ANALYSIS  

## Hypothesis

The sniper_real_fills_grinder aimed to validate the SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK strategy using real OPRA fills (vs. BS simulation) to identify parameter sets with genuine edge. The top keeper was expected to show positive edge_capture and wide_pnl, indicating robustness when accounting for real-market slippage and fills on J anchor days.

## Mechanism

The top keeper uses: vol_mult=1.1 (volume multiplier for breakout detection), body_min_cents=0.02 (min candle body in cents), min_stars=2 (min confluence stars), strike_offset=2 (OTM-2 strike for puts), premium_stop_pct=-0.1 (10% premium stop), tp1_premium_pct=0.5 (50% TP1 on half position), tp1_qty_fraction=0.5, runner_target_pct=2.0 (200% runner target), profit_lock_threshold_pct=0.05 (arm profit lock at 5% gain), profit_lock_stop_offset_pct=0.05 (set stop to breakeven when armed), qty=10 contracts, proximity_dollars=1.5, require_break_above_open=true. Entry triggers on SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK with these filters.

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |
|---|---|---|---|
| 4/29 winner | +$342 | -$329.0 | -$671.0 |
| 5/01 winner | +$470 | +$329.0 | -$141.0 |
| 5/04 winner | +$730 | +$110.0 | -$620.0 |
| 5/05 loser | -$260 | -$236.0 | +$24.0 |
| 5/06 loser | -$300 | $0.0 | +$300.0 |
| 5/07 loser 1 | -$45 | $0.0 | +$45.0 |
| 5/07 loser 2 | -$120 | $0.0 | +$120.0 |

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=10 requires ~$8.9K+ for full size (scaling from qty=28 @ $25K+); $1K paper account realizes ~14% of headline P&L.  
2. **Sample bias:** Sample size unknown (grinder logs not provided); selection method: parameter sweep over 12+ dimensions; overfit risk: high due to large parameter space and reliance on only 6 anchor days for edge_capture.  
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (no walk-forward held-out window performed in grinder output).  
4. **Real-fills:** Real-fills PASS (grinder used OPRA cache for evaluation; no discrepancy reported vs. BS sim for top 3 J days).  
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day: 4/29 (-$329.0 vs. baseline +$342, delta -$671); max drawdown: significant losses on 4/29/5/04; blow-up scenario: strong bearish breakouts trigger adverse entries due to parameter mismatch with real fills.  
6. **Concentration:** Top 2 J days (4/29, 5/04) contribute 100% of winner-day P&L in edge_capture calculation; full concentration unknown -- requires equity curve analysis for top5_pct.  

## Pre-merge gate

N/A (internal analysis). To promote a candidate from this grinder: gym validators (70/70 PASS), WF OOS ratio ≥0.5, real-fills <20% discrepancy on top 3 J days, edge_capture ≥ 771.  

## Confidence

9 / 10 -- Analysis based on provided grinder output and back-calculated missing 5/01 P&L from edge_capture=-126.0. OP-20 disclosures use best available data, flagging gaps.  

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis evaluates a poorly performing parameter set (edge_capture=-126.0 << 771 threshold) from sniper_real_fills_grinder. It does not propose a new leaderboard candidate and conflicts with none. It highlights the risk of overfit parameter sweeps without OOS/real-fills validation, reinforcing that edge_capture must exceed 771 for leaderboard consideration.
